description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-tabs: tabbed content organizer with horizontal/vertical orientations. Content organization pattern used on every healthcare site. Manual and automatic activation modes.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-tabs/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Horizontal and vertical orientations
- [ ] Manual and automatic activation modes
- [ ] Keyboard: arrow keys, Home, End
- [ ] CSS parts: tablist, tab, panel
- [ ] Slots: default (tab panels)
- [ ] Events: hx-tab-change
- [ ] ARIA: role=tablist/tab/tabpanel, aria-selected, aria-controls
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** large
title: Implement hx-tabs component
